product_description: A simple blog where users can write and publish articles

output.summary: A simple blog where users can write and publish articles

components.name: Article Editor
components.description: Allows users to create and edit articles

components.name: Article List
components.description: Displays a list of published articles

components.name: User Authentication
components.description: Handles user registration, login, and authentication

api_endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of published articles
Retrieves a single article by ID
Updates a single article by ID
Deletes a single article by ID

development_phases.name: Testing and Deployment
tasks: Write unit tests and integration tests

recommended_libraries.name: React Hook Form
recommended_libraries.purpose: Simplifies form handling and validation in React
recommended_libraries.why: Reduces boilerplate code and improves form handling efficiency

recommended_libraries.name: MySQL2
recommended_libraries.why: Provides a promise-based interface for interacting with MySQL

recommended_libraries.name: Redis client
recommended_libraries.why: Improves performance by reducing database queries

similar_projects.name: Medium
similar_projects.what_to_learn: Content management, user engagement, and scalability

similar_projects.name: Ghost
similar_projects.what_to_learn: Minimalistic design, simplicity, and ease of use

best_practices.practice: Separate components into logical folders and files
Implement try-catch blocks and error logging
best_practices.reason: Ensures robustness and helps with debugging

best_practices.practice: Validate user input and use prepared statements
best_practices.reason: Prevents SQL injection and cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks

potential_pitfalls.solution: Keep the design simple and focused on the core requirements
Write comprehensive unit tests and integration tests

security_considerations.solution: Implement secure password hashing, salting, and authentication protocols
Use HTTPS and encrypt sensitive data in transit and at rest
